description: Apex Portfolio framework constants, encoded from the Strategy Thesis (Sections 03-04).

policy._note: No idle cash. Freed cash is swept back into positions each day (proportional to target weight, capped at the soft cap). Rule 9's cash-raise is paused under this policy.

review._note: Strategic theme/allocation review every calendar quarter. Free re-target within each theme's min/max range; may add/drop themes. Forward-mode judgment (Claude Code); logged as held checkpoints in backtest.

_ruleset_note: v2 = patience-first. Default state is HOLD. Only three tactical actions, all rare and judgment-based: exit on a CONFIRMED broken thesis, rotate on a matured thesis (Rule 10), add to confirmed strength (contract/milestone). The churn rules from v1 (daily dip-buy, soft-cap winner-trim, bear cash-raise, gold-hedge scaling) are removed because the honest backtest showed they destroyed value vs buy-and-hold. Set to 'v1' to restore the original 11 rules.
